descriptor.accessibility_note: Presence and handoff states carry an icon and text; provider-only gaps are declared honestly.
Cached, stale, and partial rows carry a row-level badge with text, never tint alone.
Embedded-content states inherit shell tokens; provider-only gaps are declared, not hidden.
Cell run, error, and stale states carry an icon and text, never color alone.
Destructive and blocked states carry an icon and text, never color alone.
Preview-only and stale badges spell out the state in text beside the token tint.
Diagnostic intensities are token-driven; severity is also labelled in the legend.
Pass, fail, and blocked states carry a status icon and text, never color alone.
Sync-pending and conflict states carry an icon and text, never color alone.
Replay timeline states carry a text label in addition to the token tint.
